news.t: BMO Announces Upcoming Reverse Splits of Six Series of its Exchange Traded Notes (NYSE Arca: BERZ, BNKD, DULL, FLYD, NRGD and OILD)

holdings.infoBox: OILD is an equity ETF with a total of 25 individual holdings. The top holdings are Chevron stock at 15.36%, Exxon Mobil at 14.46%, ConocoPhillips at 6.51%, SLB N.V. at 6.36%, and Occidental Petroleum at 4.85%.

overview.description: The MicroSectors Oil & Gas Exp. & Prod. - 3x Inverse Leveraged ETN (OILD) is an exchange-traded note that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund provides 300% daily inverse exposure to a liquidity-weighted index of US firms involved in oil and gas exploration and production. OILD was launched on Nov 8, 2021 and is issued by REX Microsectors.
infoTable: Solactive MicroSectors Oil & Gas Exploration & Production Index

data.title: BMO Announces Upcoming Reverse Splits of Six Series of its Exchange Traded Notes (NYSE Arca: BERZ, BNKD, DULL, FLYD, NRGD and OILD)
data.text: NEW YORK, Feb. 12, 2026 /PRNewswire/ - Bank of Montreal ("BMO") today announced that it will be implementing reverse splits of six series of its outstanding Exchange Traded Notes listed in the table b...
